description: issue #332 (A2): executing the bare `explain` meta-command emits exactly one `tutor-output` event (A0 #324's event kind + payload in @openlogo/core) with `command: "explain"`, a non-empty `segments` array, and no `target_source_span` — `explain` is the only statement, so there is no preceding runtime event to point at (spec/execution-model.md#tutor-output-educational-profile).

segments: Here is what your program does.
